argv: login flow: LoginViewController, LoginView, AuthService, AppRouter, MainTabBarController — how does the user get from login to home screen

SUCCESS: For the login flow, what exactly counts as a pass? My proposed assertion: after submitting the QA credentials the app replaces the login screen with the main tab bar and the Home tab ('Trang chủ') is visible/selected. Is that the success criterion, or do you want something more specific (e.g. a particular home element/content loaded)?

FAILURE: What does a REAL failure of this flow look like in this app, so I don't mistake it for flakiness? (e.g. stays on the login screen with the inline error 'Sai tên đăng nhập hoặc mật khẩu', or bounces back to the intro screen, or hangs on a spinner)

BLOCKERS: What could block this run? (b) does the QA account require OTP/2FA or any backend/test-data setup? (c) is the terms-of-use checkbox / web terms sheet expected to be part of the happy path?
ENVIRONMENT: Which backend is the QA account (APP_TEST_USERNAME/APP_TEST_PASSWORD) valid against — production, staging, or a mock backend? Neither .agentqa/config.yml nor memory/env.md says.

BLOCKER OBSERVED LIVE: on launch, SpringBoard shows the iOS alert '"MyTV" Would Like to Send You Notifications' with buttons 'Don't Allow' and 'Allow'. This sits outside the app hierarchy and blocks the flow. Which action should the test (and my exploration) take — tap 'Allow' or tap 'Don't Allow'?
